introSection: Loop The Loop (Japanese: ループ・ザ・ループ) is a steel shuttle roller coaster currently located at Rusutsu Resort in Rusutsu, Abuta, Shiribeshi, Hokkaido, Japan. It is the only Meisho Loop the Loop left in operation.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Light red track and white supports. The rides loop was repainted to green at some point, but this was eventually reverted.

fullText:
Loop The Loop (Japanese: ループ・ザ・ループ) is a steel shuttle roller coaster currently located at Rusutsu Resort in Rusutsu, Abuta, Shiribeshi, Hokkaido, Japan. It is the only Meisho Loop the Loop left in operation.



Light red track and white supports. The rides loop was repainted to green at some point, but this was eventually reverted.
